scripts.build: export GIT_COMMIT_HASH=$([ -n "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA" ] && echo "${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA:0:7}" || git rev-parse --short HEAD) && GALLERY_MODE=r2 npm run parse && next build
scripts.build:local: export GIT_COMMIT_HASH=$([ -n "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA" ] && echo "${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA:0:7}" || git rev-parse --short HEAD) && GALLERY_MODE=local npm run build
scripts.build:r2: export GIT_COMMIT_HASH=$([ -n "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA" ] && echo "${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA:0:7}" || git rev-parse --short HEAD) && GALLERY_MODE=r2 npm run build
